revision.comment: Changed protection level of Template:State establishment category: [[Wikipedia:High-risk templates|Highly-visible template]] (over 1000 transclusions) (‎[edit=autoconfirmed] (indefinite) ‎[move=sysop] (indefinite))
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{State establishment category/core
|1={{#if:{{{2|}}}<!--
 -->|{{#ifeq:{{uc:{{{2}}}}}|BC<!--
   -->|-{{#if:1|{{{1}}}}}<!--
   -->|{{#expr:10*{{{1}}}+{{{2}}}}}<!--
  -->}}<!--
 -->|{{{1|}}}
}}
|dis={{#ifeq:{{PAGENAME}}|States and territories disestablished in {{State establishment category/year|<!--
-->{{#if:{{{2|}}}<!--
 -->|{{#ifeq:{{uc:{{{2}}}}}|BC<!--
   -->|-{{#if:1|{{{1}}}}}<!--
   -->|{{#expr:10*{{{1}}}+{{{2}}}}}<!--
  -->}}<!--
 -->|{{{1|}}}
}}<!--
-->}}|dis}}
|_nocat={{{_nocat|}}}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation}}
<!-- PLEASE ADD CATEGORIES AND INTERWIKIS TO THE /doc SUBPAGE, THANKS -->
</noinclude>

<includeonly>{{State establishment category/core
|1={{#if:{{{2|}}}<!--
 -->|{{#ifeq:{{uc:{{{2}}}}}|BC<!--
   -->|-{{#if:1|{{{1}}}}}<!--
   -->|{{#expr:10*{{{1}}}+{{{2}}}}}<!--
  -->}}<!--
 -->|{{{1|}}}
}}
|dis={{#ifeq:{{PAGENAME}}|States and territories disestablished in {{State establishment category/year|<!--
-->{{#if:{{{2|}}}<!--
 -->|{{#ifeq:{{uc:{{{2}}}}}|BC<!--
   -->|-{{#if:1|{{{1}}}}}<!--
   -->|{{#expr:10*{{{1}}}+{{{2}}}}}<!--
  -->}}<!--
 -->|{{{1|}}}
}}<!--
-->}}|dis}}
|_nocat={{{_nocat|}}}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation}}
<!-- PLEASE ADD CATEGORIES AND INTERWIKIS TO THE /doc SUBPAGE, THANKS -->
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{State establishment category/core
|1={{#if:{{{2|}}}<!--
 -->|{{#ifeq:{{uc:{{{2}}}}}|BC<!--
   -->|-{{#if:1|{{{1}}}}}<!--
   -->|{{#expr:10*{{{1}}}+{{{2}}}}}<!--
  -->}}<!--
 -->|{{{1|}}}
}}
|dis={{#ifeq:{{PAGENAME}}|States and territories disestablished in {{State establishment category/year|<!--
-->{{#if:{{{2|}}}<!--
 -->|{{#ifeq:{{uc:{{{2}}}}}|BC<!--
   -->|-{{#if:1|{{{1}}}}}<!--
   -->|{{#expr:10*{{{1}}}+{{{2}}}}}<!--
  -->}}<!--
 -->|{{{1|}}}
}}<!--
-->}}|dis}}
|_nocat={{{_nocat|}}}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation}}
<!-- PLEASE ADD CATEGORIES AND INTERWIKIS TO THE /doc SUBPAGE, THANKS -->
</noinclude>
<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{State establishment category/core
|1={{#if:{{{2|}}}<!--
 -->|{{#ifeq:{{uc:{{{2}}}}}|BC<!--

{{Documentation}}

</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{State establishment category/core
|1={{#if:{{{2|}}}<!--
 -->|{{#ifeq:{{uc:{{{2}}}}}|BC<!--
   -->|-{{#if:1|{{{1}}}}}<!--

  -->}}<!--

-->{{#if:{{{2|}}}<!--
 -->|{{#ifeq:{{uc:{{{2}}}}}|BC<!--
   -->|-{{#if:1|{{{1}}}}}<!--
   -->|{{#expr:10*{{{1}}}+{{{2}}}}}<!--
  -->}}<!--
 -->|{{{1|}}}

-->}}|dis}}

}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation}}
<!-- PLEASE ADD CATEGORIES AND INTERWIKIS TO THE /doc SUBPAGE, THANKS -->
</noinclude>
[[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{State establishment category/core
|1={{#if:{{{2|}}}<!--
 -->|{{#ifeq:{{uc:{{{2}}}}}|BC<!--

  -->}}<!--
 -->|{{{1|}}}
}}<!--

}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]
<!-- PLEASE ADD CATEGORIES AND INTERWIKIS TO THE /doc SUBPAGE, THANKS -->
</noinclude>
[[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23606946259|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{State establishment category/core
|1={{#if:{{{2|}}}<!--
 -->|{{#ifeq:{{uc:{{{2}}}}}|BC<!--
   -->|-{{#if:1|{{{1}}}}}<!--
   -->|{{#expr:10*{{{1}}}+{{{2}}}}}<!--
  -->}}<!--

|dis={{#ifeq:{{PAGENAME}}|States and territories disestablished in {{State establishment category/year|<!--

   -->|-{{#if:1|{{{1}}}}}<!--

  -->}}<!--
 -->|{{{1|}}}
}}<!--
-->}}|dis}}
|_nocat={{{_nocat|}}}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]
<!-- PLEASE ADD CATEGORIES AND INTERWIKIS TO THE /doc SUBPAGE, THANKS -->
</noinclude>
<noinclude>
[[Category:Templates]]

</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24975162458|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{State establishment category/core
|1={{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{#ifeq:{{uc:{{{2}}}}}|BC|-{{#if:1|{{{1}}}}}|{{#expr:10*{{{1}}}+{{{2}}}}}}}|{{{1|}}}
}}
|dis={{#ifeq:{{PAGENAME}}|States and territories disestablished in {{State establishment category/year|{{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{#ifeq:{{uc:{{{2}}}}}|BC|-{{#if:1|{{{1}}}}}|{{#expr:10*{{{1}}}+{{{2}}}}}}}|{{{1|}}}
}}}}|dis}}
|_nocat={{{_nocat|}}}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]

[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>
